# EU-DOC

EU-DOC is a product compliance document platform for organizing and sharing public product documents online.

## What EU-DOC is for

EU-DOC helps companies present product-related documents such as certificates, DoC declarations, user manuals, test reports, and basic product information through searchable web pages.

Typical use cases:
- Store and share public product compliance documents online.
- Let customers, procurement teams, or reviewers find documents by company, product, model, or document number.
- Provide product pages that connect product information with related public documents.

## Important note

EU-DOC is not a certification body and does not replace official verification by issuing authorities. Uploaded documents are provided by companies or users responsible for their accuracy and legality.

## Main pages

- Solutions: https://christmasldw.com/eu-doc/solutions
- Search: https://christmasldw.com/eu-doc/search
- Contact: https://christmasldw.com/eu-doc/contact
